title: oenanthe laciniata
intro: Oenanthe laciniata, also known as cut-leaved water plantain or water fern, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Oenanthe laciniata include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating kidney stones, among others. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in tinctures and poultices, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
